content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (post iter-011)

## Top priority: the assoc chain is the ONLY live SNAP lane
comm is correctly parked (invertibility-gated, no consumer). Route the prover at the **assoc** chain.
Build order (smallest-first, each unblocks the next):

1. **`sectionsMul_whiskerRight_unit` (B2)** ‚Äî START HERE. Smallest, unblocks B5. Exact LHS shape is
   the inner expression of `tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul`'s LHS:
   `(sectionsMul (tensorObj A B) C).hom ((sectionsMul A B).hom (a‚äó‚Çúb) ‚äó‚Çú c)` (this DOES elaborate ‚Äî
   expected type driven through `(sectionsMul ‚Ä¶).hom`). **CRITICAL directive constraint:** state the
   RHS presheaf-morphism map and drive every `‚äó‚Çú` by an enclosing `.hom` application ‚Äî NEVER a bare
   annotated `‚äó‚Çú[forget‚ÇÇ-ring]` (that hits the `CommRing`-behind-`forget‚ÇÇ` instance diamond ‚Äî the
   dominant time-sink of iter-011, see B1 KEY FINDING in `task_results/SectionGradedRing.md`).
   Recipe: `sectionsMul F G` unfolds to `(sheafAdjUnit.app (F'‚äó_pG')).app(op‚ä§)` (`rfl`) ‚Üí
   `PresheafOfModules.comp_app` + `whiskerRight_app` (`@[simp] rfl`) + ModuleCat `whiskerRight` action
   `x‚äó‚Çúc ‚Ü¶ g x ‚äó‚Çú c` (find the `whiskerRight_tmul`-style lemma ‚Äî likely needs `erw`).
2. **`sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_unit` (B3)** ‚Äî identical to B2, second factor sheafified
   (`whiskerLeft_app`).
3. **`tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor` (B4)** ‚Äî the DEEP crux. 5-segment bridge telescoping over canonical
   `Œ±_` via `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit` + the full-defeq `simp only`
   (`Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc` / `whiskerLeft_hom_inv_assoc` / `hom_inv_whiskerRight_assoc`) recipe proven
   on `tensorPowAdd_zero_right`. **If it stalls, effort-break at sentence level** (the effort-breaker
   already flagged it as the residue).
4. **`tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul` (B5)** ‚Äî assembly: evaluate B4 at `‚ä§` on `(a‚äób)‚äóc`; LHS via B2,
   RHS via B3 + `presheafAssociator_top_apply` (PROVEN this iter, axiom-clean).
5. **`tensorPowAdd_assoc` (B6)** ‚Äî canonical pentagon induction (`MonoidalCategory.pentagon` in place
   of the triangle in `canonical_runit_core`). Sketch SOUND.
6. **`sectionsMul_mul_assoc` (B7)** ‚Äî final assembly: B5 + Œº-naturality slide + B6 + `sectionsCast_self`,
   mirroring `sectionsMul_mul_one`.

Suggest a `prove` (not fine-grained) lane on B2 first ‚Äî it is the keystone whose plumbing recipe, once
solved, transfers to B3/B4.

## Do NOT re-assign (blocked / parked)
- **`sectionsMul_mul_comm`, `tensorPowAdd_comm`, `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`** ‚Äî comm
  leg, invertibility-gated, NO consumer (`GCommSemiring` unbuilt). Close only when/if the commutative
  upgrade is actually built. Re-anchor is DONE (signature sound). Not a prover lane.
- **œá leg (`QuotScheme.lean`, 4 sorries)** ‚Äî deferred to cohomology leg at merge. Do not probe.

## Blueprint coverage debt (planner: blueprint these)
- `def:isInvertible` prose fix: a `% NOTE:` was added flagging that blueprint says "trivializing-cover
  form" but Lean `IsInvertible` is the ‚äó-invertible form. Dispatch blueprint-writer to reword the
  sentence to match the Lean class (the ‚äó-invertible form is the clean, standard, consumed one). See
  `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter011.md`.
- Pre-existing SGR helper coverage debt (carried, `archon dag-query unmatched`): `moduleTensorPow_zero`,
  `tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso`, `tensorObjWhiskerRightIso`, `tensorPow_succ`, `tensorPow_zero`,
  `sectionsCast_apply/_sectionsCast/_self`, `gMul_mul_apply`, `gOne_one_eq`. Bulk of the 324 unmatched
  are out-of-cone inherited `Grassmannian.*` / glue / pullback extraction artifacts (resolve at merge);
  the SGR-namespace helpers above are the in-cone ones worth blueprint blocks.

## Code hygiene (low, for a refactor pass ‚Äî NOT blocking)
- Prune 2 stale `DEFERRED` comment blocks (auditor): `relTensorActL/R/Proj` (~L700, all implemented
  L575-698) and `tensorPowAdd` (~L869, implemented L2093). 1 superseded block + 38 long lines.

## Progress note for next planner
3‚Üí5 sorry is the EXPECTED shape of the re-anchor iter, not churn: the false comm signature was
eliminated and replaced by a sound invertibility-gated route; `presheafAssociator_top_apply` proven
axiom-clean is the first genuine assoc-chain atom landed. The progress-critic's iter-010 STUCK verdict
on comm is now resolved structurally (the goal was unprovable as stated; rejecting it is the correct
outcome). The live convergence question is now purely the assoc chain (B2‚ÜíB7).
